items.title: Kevin Morby & Waxahatchee Announce New Coolest Baby
items.summary: When Waxahatchee and MJ Lenderman kicked off their co-headlining tour back in April, Katie Crutchfield had a surprise: She was pregnant. Crutchfield reportedly introduced her final song of the night by saying, "This is a song about having a baby. This one’s going to hit a little different for me now." That baby is here now, so it'll hit even more different in the future.

items.title: Adéla Announces Debut Album Prima: Hear “Ain’t In LA”
items.summary: In 2023, Adéla rose to prominence through The Debut: Dream Academy, the talent competition reality show that spawned K-Pop titans KATSEYE. So far this year, the Slovakian singer has shared "KGB" and "Red Bottoms," both of which boast pop star appeal and high-profile collaborators like 100 Gecs' Dylan Brady. Now, she's announcing her debut album Prima, arriving this fall.
